title: Portable Infrared Patio Heater 1500W Electric Heater with 8 Heating Levels, Tip-over Protection, IP45 Waterproof, 8H Timer, Remote Control, 33 Inch, Elegent Brown
features: 2S Rapid Heating： Electric patio heater adopts advanced CarbonUltra technology and high-efficiency carbon fibre filaments, 2S Rapid heating provides sunshine-like instant and concentrated heat, which directly transfers heat to your body and makes you feel comfortable and warm in an instant, the infrared heater also promotes blood circulation without any side-effects, which is especially suitable for children, the elderly and people pursuing a healthy life.

Easy to Use：The electric tower heater features an one-touch knob and LED light design for easy to use. You can adjust the 1-8 heating setting at the red light, and choose 1-8 hour timer at the green light. Press the knob to enable oscillation. The heater also comes with a full-function remote control makes you to do all the operations without moving.

Ideal for Outdoor/Indoor Use：The Airvention Electric infrared heater offers 8 heating levels, catering to diverse heating requirements. It is accompanied by a 1-8 hour timer, allowing you to customize the duration of use and power level, thus ensuring optimal comfort while efficiently conserving energy. The inclusion of a carrying handle facilitates easy transportation between rooms.

Large Range Coverage：Standing at a height of 33 inches, this heater for large rooms surpasses other indoor space heaters in terms of elevation, resulting in a broader heating range that envelops your entire body instead of merely a portion of it. Moreover, the tower space heater boasts a 75° widespread oscillation feature, enabling you to share warmth with others. It serves as a perfect solution for personal heating or heating your home.

Quiet Operation：The outdoor electric heater's timer function enables you to pre-set the desired duration, ranging from 1 to 8 hours, before bedtime, thereby ensuring safety and energy conservation. These infrared patio heaters offer a serene and noiseless companion, making them ideal for noise-sensitive environments and facilitating a peaceful slumber.

Multiple Protection： The outdoor heater incorporates multiple protection mechanisms, including tip-over automatic power off, overheat protection, IP45 dust and waterproofing, and corrosion resistance. The carbon fiber material ensures a service life of 10,000 hours, rendering it highly durable. It is safe for children and pets.
